name: Dom Irrera
blurb: He won a CableACE Award for his 1989 episode of HBOs One Night Stand and was a recurring presence on Dr. Katz, Professional Therapist.
bio: Dom Irrera is an American stand-up comedian and actor whose material draws heavily on stories about his life and his Italian-American upbringing in South Philadelphia. He won a CableACE Award for his 1989 episode of HBOs One Night Stand and was a recurring presence on Dr. Katz, Professional Therapist. He has appeared on The Tonight Show, Letterman, and as a guest actor on Seinfeld and The King of Queens.

timeline.ev: Appeared on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson
Won CableACE Award for HBO One Night Stand episode
Guest role as Ronnie Kaye on Seinfeld

accolades: CableACE Award for HBO One Night Stand (1989)
Named one of Comedy Centrals 100 funniest comics of all time

movies_tv.t: Lois & Clark: The New Adventures of Superman
